3-color-cake-teleculinaria.name: 3 Color Cake
instructions: Bata o açúcar com a manteiga amolecida. Junte os ovos um a um, batendo sempre. Adicione depois o leite e, por fim, a farinha e o fermento.
Divida a massa em três partes. Numa delas, adicione um pouco de cacau em pó, noutra algumas gotas de corante vermelho e, à terceira, não adicione nada.
Deite as massas, alternadamente, numa forma untada e polvilhada com farinha. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 175ºc, durante 30 minutos ou até o palito sair seco. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

3-egg-carrot-walnut-cinnamon-cake-recipe.name: 3 Egg Carrot Walnut Cinnamon Cake Recipe
3-egg-carrot-walnut-cinnamon-cake-recipe.original_name: 3 Yumurtalı Havuçlu Cevizli Tarçınlı Kek Tarifi

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağından biraz fazla sıvı yağ
Yumurta boyutu küçükse 1 adet fazla kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha süngerimsi bir doku için yumurta aklarını ayrı çırpıp son aşamada ekleyebilirsiniz.
Esmer şeker kullanarak daha yoğun ve karamelimsi bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Şeker miktarını azaltarak daha az tatlı bir kek yapabilirsiniz.
Yarım sıvı yağ + yarım eritilmiş tereyağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı tercih ederek daha aromatik bir lezzet elde edebilirsiniz.
Süt yerine yoğurt kullanarak daha yoğun ve nemli bir doku yakalayabilirsiniz.
Laktozsuz süt veya bitkisel sütler (badem, yulaf) da kullanılabilir.
Yarım beyaz un + yarım tam buğday unu kullanarak daha tok tutan bir kek hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Unun bir kısmını yulaf unu ile değiştirerek lif oranını artırabilirsiniz.
Havuç miktarını artırarak daha nemli bir kek elde edebilirsiniz.
İnce rendelenmiş elma ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.
Cevizi iri bırakmak kekte daha belirgin bir doku sağlar.
Tarçına ek olarak muskat veya zencefil ekleyebilirsiniz.
Baharat miktarını damak zevkinize göre ayarlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilya özütü kullanarak daha doğal bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yumurta ve toz şekeri derin bir kapta açık renk alana kadar çırpın.
2. Sıvı yağ ve sütü ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
3. Rendelenmiş havucu ilave edip spatula ile karıştırın.
4. Un, kabartma tozu, vanilin ve tarçını eleyerek ekleyin.
5. Son olarak cevizleri ekleyip homojen olacak şekilde karıştırın.
6. Yağlanmış ve unlanmış kek kalıbına harcı dökün.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 170–175°C fırında yaklaşık 40–45 dakika pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkan keki kalıbında 10 dakika dinlendirdikten sonra çıkarın ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-brownie-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Brownie Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 tepeleme yemek kaşığı kahvaltılık kakaolu fındık kreması
1 yemek kaşığı çekilmiş fındık (isterseniz antep fıstığı da kullanabilirsiniz)

instructions: 1. İlk olarak yumurtaları derin bir karıştırma kabına kırın ve köpüklenene kadar çırpın.
2.  Ardından kakaolu fındık kremasını ekleyip karışım tamamen bütünleşene kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
3. Unu yavaş yavaş ilave ederek pürüzsüz, akışkan ama yoğun bir kıvam elde edene kadar karıştırın.
4.  Hazırladığınız brownie harcını mini muffin kalıplarına, kalıpların yaklaşık ¾’ünü dolduracak şekilde paylaştırın.
5. Üzerlerine dilediğiniz kadar çekilmiş fındık ya da Antep fıstığı serpin.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış 190°C fırında 6–7 dakika pişirin.
7.  Fırından çıktıktan sonra ılımasını bekleyip kalıptan çıkararak servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-cheese-and-salty-cookies-re.name: 3 Ingredient Cheese And Salty Cookies Recipe

ingredients.item: Süzme peynir yerine lor peyniri veya ezilmiş beyaz peynir kullanılabilir. daha yoğun bir tat için kaşar peyniri de tercih edilebilir.
Mısır unu yerine aynı miktarda tam buğday unu veya normal un kullanılabilir. bu durumda kurabiyenin dokusu biraz daha farklı olabilir.
çörek otu yerine susam, haşhaş veya ayçekirdeği içi kullanılabilir.
Kurabiyelere farklı bir aroma katmak için hamura ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanoz eklenebilir.
Daha yoğun bir peynir tadı için hamura birkaç yemek kaşığı rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri ilave edilebilir.
Hafif baharatlı bir lezzet elde etmek için karışıma bir tutam karabiber veya kırmızı pul biber eklenebilir.

instructions: 1. Derin bir karıştırma kabına süzme peyniri alın.
2.  Üzerine mısır unu ve çörek otunu ekleyin.
3. Tüm malzemeleri elinizle yoğurarak yumuşak ve toparlanan bir hamur elde edin.
4. Hazırladığınız hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde yuvarlayın.
5. Şekil verdiğiniz hamurları yağlı kâğıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
6. Önceden 180 °C’ye ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 15–20 dakika, üzerleri hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
7. Fırından çıkan kurabiyeleri birkaç dakika dinlendirdikten sonra servis edebilirsiniz.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-cheesecake-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Cheesecake
instructions: 1. Yumurtaların sarılarını ve beyazlarını dikkatlice ayırın.
2.  Beyazlarını cam bir kapta buzdolabına alın, soğuk kalmaları köpürmeleri için önemli.
3. Beyaz çikolatayı benmari usulü veya mikrodalgada düşük ısıda eritin.
4.  Hafif ılındığında krem peyniri ekleyin ve pürüzsüz bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın.
5. Karışıma yumurta sarılarını ekleyin ve iyice yedirin.
6. Soğuk yumurta beyazlarını mikserle sert köpük hâline gelene dek çırpın (kar gibi olmalı).
7.  Sonra bu köpüğü peynirli karışıma üç aşamada, spatula ile alttan üste katlayarak yedirin.
8.  Hacmini söndürmemeye dikkat edin.
9. 15–18 cm çapında kelepçeli bir kalıbın içini yağlayın, tabanına yağlı kâğıt serin.
10.  Karışımı kalıba dökün.
11.  Kalıbı bir fırın tepsisine yerleştirin ve bu tepsiye 1 parmak kadar sıcak su ekleyin (benmari yöntemi).
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
13.  Sonra sıcaklığı 140 derece’ye düşürüp 20–25 dakika daha pişirin.
14.  Fırını kapatın, kapağı aralık bırakıp içinde 15 dakika bekletin.
15. Oda sıcaklığına gelen keki buzdolabında en az 3 saat (ideali 1 gece) dinlendirin.
16.  İsteğe bağlı olarak üzerine pudra şekeri serpebilir ya da meyveyle süsleyebilirsiniz.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-cocostar-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Cocostar Recipe

ingredients.item: Süt yerine krema kullanarak daha yoğun ve yumuşak bir iç doku elde edebilirsiniz.
Pudra şekeri yerine bal veya pekmez kullanarak daha doğal bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
çikolata olarak bitter, sütlü veya beyaz çikolata tercih edebilirsiniz.
Daha sağlıklı bir alternatif için şekersiz çikolata kullanabilirsiniz.
Hindistancevizine biraz süt tozu ekleyerek daha kremamsı bir kıvam elde edebilirsiniz.
İçine ince kıyılmış badem veya fındık ekleyerek farklı bir doku kazandırabilirsiniz.
üzerine çikolata yerine kakao serpiştirerek daha hafif bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vegan yapmak isterseniz süt yerine bitkisel süt kullanabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Hindistancevizi ve pudra şekerini bir kaba alın.
2.  Üzerine krema (ya da süt) ve vanilini ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Ele yapışmayan, şekil verilebilir bir kıvam elde edin.
4. Karışımdan parçalar koparıp baton veya oval şekil verin.
5.  Hazırladığınız parçaları yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin ve yaklaşık 20–30 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin.
6. Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin ve içine sıvı yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
7. Soğuyan hindistancevizli parçaları erimiş çikolataya batırın ve tekrar yağlı kağıt üzerine alın.
8. Çikolata tamamen donana kadar buzdolabında bekletin ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-fit-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Fit Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı damla çikolata veya kuru üzüm (isteğe bağlı)
Kuru üzüm, yaban mersini, hurma parçaları veya doğranmış kuru kayısı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun tat için bitter çikolata parçaları ekleyin.

instructions: 1. Olgun muzları bir çatal yardımıyla püre haline getirin.
2. Yulaf ezmesini ve damla çikolata veya kuru üzümü ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Karışımın kıvamı çok cıvıksa biraz daha yulaf ekleyebilirsiniz.
4. Karışımdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, elinizle yuvarlayın veya bastırarak yassı kurabiye şekli verin.
5. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında yaklaşık 15 dakika, kenarları hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
6. Kurabiyeleri fırından çıkarıp oda sıcaklığında birkaç dakika dinlendirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

3-ingredient-oven-custard-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Oven Custard Recipe
instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencereye süt, toz şeker ve unu alın.
2. Tel çırpıcıyla sürekli karıştırarak topaklanmadan, orta ateşte koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
3. Muhallebi kaynamaya başladığında ocaktan alın ve 1-2 dakika karıştırarak ilk sıcaklığını atmasını bekleyin.
4. Hazırladığınız muhallebiyi ısıya dayanıklı fırın kaplarına paylaştırın.
5. Kapları derin bir tepsiye yerleştirin ve tepsinin yarısına gelecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin (benmari yöntemi).
6. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında, üzerleri hafif kahverengi bir tabaka oluşturana kadar, yaklaşık 15–20 dakika pişirin.
7. Oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra buzdolabında en az 2 saat dinlendirin.
8. Soğuyunca fırın muhallebileriniz servise hazır.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

3-milk-cake-or-tres-leches.name: 3 Milk Cake Or Tres Leches
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Beat egg whites in a large glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy; gradually beat in sugar until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in flour, then beat in milk, egg yolks, melted butter, 4 teaspoons vanilla extract, and baking powder, thoroughly beating in each ingredient before adding the next. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and crusty on top, no more than 30 minutes. Cool cake in the pan for 10 minutes; gently remove from the pan to finish cooling.

Whisk sweetened condensed milk, evaporated milk, and half-and-half together in a bowl; pour half into a pan deeper and longer than cake. Lay cooled cake in milk mixture; score deep lines in cake top using a fork. Pour remaining milk mixture over cake, allowing mixture to soak in.

Beat cream cheese and remaining 1 teaspoon vanilla extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until soft and fluffy; gradually beat in heavy cream until frosting is thick and spreadable. Spread over cake.

3-milk-tapioca-recipe-comedera.name: 3 Milk Tapioca Recipe

ingredients.item: 1, 1/2 tazas de leche completa o regular

instructions: En un bol, incorpora la tapioca y dos tazas de agua. Deja remojar por unos 20 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, escurre muy bien el agua de la tapioca y reserva.
En una olla, vierte las otras tres tazas de agua y la tapioca. Cocina por unos 40 minutos a fuego medio hasta que vaya soltando el almidón.
Cuando pasen esos 40 minutos, vierte la leche completa, la leche condensada y la leche evaporada. Mezcla muy bien.
Incorpora la esencia de vainilla, mezcla y termina de cocinar por unos 15 minutos.
Luego, apaga y deja reposar un poco.
Sirve con canela en polvo y cerezas en almíbar. ¡Disfruta!

3-spoon-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Spoon Soup Recipe
instructions: 1. Pirinç, bulgur ve yeşil mercimeği yıkayıp süzün.
2. Bir tencereye 2 su bardağı kaynar suyu alın, içine tuzu ve yıkadığınız malzemeleri ekleyin.
3. Orta ateşte, malzemeler iyice yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
4.  Ara ara karıştırın ve gerekirse biraz sıcak su ekleyin.
5. Yoğurdu bir kaseye alın, üzerine yumurta ve unu ekleyip iyice çırpın.
6. Limon suyunu da ekleyerek homojen bir karışım elde edin.
7. Çorbanın suyundan birkaç kaşık alıp terbiyeye ekleyin ve hızlıca karıştırarak ılıştırın.
8. Ilınan terbiyeyi yavaş yavaş çorbaya ekleyin ve çorbayı karıştırarak kısık ateşte birkaç dakika kaynatın.
9. Soğanı ince ince doğrayın.
10. Küçük bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın, soğanları ekleyip pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
11. Pul biber ve naneyi ekleyip kısa bir süre karıştırdıktan sonra ocaktan alın.
12. Çorbayı kaselere alın.
13. Üzerine hazırladığınız sosu gezdirin.
14. Sıcak olarak servis edin.

3-cheese-garlic-bread.name: 3-cheese Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a bowl, combine all of the ingredients except the baguette, and mix until smooth.
Slice the baguette in half lengthwise, then spread the butter mixture evenly on both sides of the baguette.
Place on a tray lined with parchment paper and bake for about 15 minutes, until cheese is bubbly and starting to brown on the edges.
Slice, cool, then serve.

3-chile-harissa.name: 3-chile Harissa
instructions: Place árbol, guajillo, and ancho chiles in a large heatproof measuring glass. Pour boiling water over to submerge, cover with plastic wrap, and let sit until chiles are very pliable and cool enough to handle, 15–20 minutes. Drain; remove stems and seeds and discard (wear gloves for this part if you have them).

Toast cumin and coriander in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, tossing constantly, until very fragrant, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a food processor, add garlic, and pulse until spices are broken up and garlic forms a paste. Add chiles and pulse until chiles form a coarse paste. Add lemon juice, vinegar, tomato paste, paprika, and salt and process until mostly smooth but mixture still has a little texture. With the motor running, stream in ½ cup oil. Process until oil is incorporated.
Transfer harissa to a bowl. Pour remaining ¼ cup oil over top.
Harissa can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.

3-hour-pizza.name: 3-hour Pizza
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook, combine the flour, sugar, salt, and instant yeast. Start mixing on low speed. Stream in the olive oil and water and mix for 2 minutes, until the flour is incorporated.
Increase the mixer speed to medium, and mix for 6–8 minutes more, until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Lightly grease a large bowl with olive oil. Transfer the dough to the bowl, cover with a kitchen towel, and let rest for 1½ hours.

Turn the risen dough onto a clean surface and shape into a ball, pulling the edges round and tight across the surface of the dough ball. Return to the bowl, cover, and let rest for another 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).

Turn out the dough onto a lightly oiled surface. Divide the dough into 2 equal portions. Liberally grease a baking sheet with olive oil. Place a portion of dough on the pan and stretch to fit the baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining portion of dough, or reserve for a later use.
Top the dough with the crushed tomatoes and mozzarella.
Bake the pizza for 15–20 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Top the pizza with flaky salt and basil. Use scissors to cut the pizza, then serve.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-buttermilk-biscuits.name: 3-ingredient Buttermilk Biscuits
instructions: Position rack in middle of oven; preheat to 260°C. Grease a rimmed baking sheet with nonstick vegetable oil spray or butter.
Place 2 cups flour in a large bowl. Cut in shortening with a pastry cutter or 2 butter knives until pea-sized lumps form. Stir in buttermilk until a shaggy dough forms.

On a lightly floured work surface, turn out dough and gently knead 2–3 times until dough just comes together, being careful to not overwork. Roll out dough to a 1/2" thickness; cut with a 2" biscuit cutter or small glass that has been dipped in flour.
Transfer biscuits to prepared baking sheet and bake until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.

3-ingredient-caramel-pear-galette.name: 3-ingredient Caramel-pear Galette

ingredients.item: Sheet prepared boxed pie crust (not in a tin)

ingredients.prep: preferably Anjou or Bartlett (about 1 1/2 pounds), thinly sliced crosswise, seeds cut out with a small round cutter or paring knife

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Unroll pie crust onto a piece of parchment, then roll out to a 13"-diameter circle. Transfer dough on parchment to a rimmed baking sheet.

Toss pears, salt, and 1/2 cup caramel sauce in a medium bowl until pears are coated. Arrange pears over crust, leaving a 1 1/2" border, piling them up as you go. Pour any caramel sauce left in bowl over pears.

Fold crust up and over edges, overlapping as needed. Bake galette until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbling, 55–60 minutes. Whisk remaining 1 Tbsp. caramel and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a small bowl and brush over pears with a pastry brush. Let cool at least 15 minutes before cutting.

3-ingredient-chili-tater-tot-cups.name: 3-ingredient Chili Tater Tot Cups

ingredients.prep: chopped scallions, pickled jalapeños, and hot sauce

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C). Lightly grease a 12-cup muffin tin with cooking spray. Place 5 frozen tater tots in each muffin cup. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until softened.

Remove from the oven. Using the bottom of a small glass or measuring cup, press the tots in each muffin cup into a cup shape. Return to the oven, and bake for about 10 minutes, or until golden and crispy.
Remove from the oven, and spoon the chili evenly into the muffin cups. Top evenly with the cheese. Return to the oven, and bake for about 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven, and let cool slightly, about 3 minutes.Top with desired garnishes, and serve.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-chili-glazed-salmon.name: 3-ingredient Chili-glazed Salmon
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200˚C).
In a bowl, mix together the salmon, chili sauce, and the scallions.
Place the fillets on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Spoon any leftover sauce on top of the salmon.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, until the salmon is cooked but still tender.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-coconut-fudge-pops.name: 3-ingredient Coconut Fudge Pops
instructions: Blend coconut milk, condensed milk, cocoa powder, and salt in a blender until smooth. Pour into ice-pop molds, leaving a little space at the top of each (you might have some left over depending on the size of your molds). Freeze 1 hour, then insert sticks and freeze until firm, at least 4 hours. Dip molds briefly in cold water to release pops.

3-ingredient-ginger-peach-ice-cream-floa.name: 3-ingredient Ginger-peach Ice Cream Floats
instructions: Cook peaches in a large pot of boiling water for 1 minute, then submerge in ice water. Slip off skins. Slice into 1/4-inch wedges.
Bring peaches and 3 cups ginger beer to a boil in a medium saucepan over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until peaches are fork-tender, about 5 minutes. Let cool completely.

To assemble floats, divide peaches among tall glasses and pour 1 tablespoon poaching liquid over each; reserve remaining poaching liquid for another use. Top with 2 scoops of ice cream, then pour remaining 3 cups ginger beer over. Serve with spoons and straws.
Poached peaches can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill.

3-ingredient-gochujang-grilled-chicken-w.name: 3-ingredient Gochujang Grilled Chicken Wings With Scallion
instructions: Pat wings very dry with paper towels. Toss wings, oil, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ tsp. pepper in a large bowl to coat.

Prepare a grill for two zones, medium and medium-high, or heat a grill pan over medium. Working in batches if necessary, grill wings over medium heat, turning occasionally, until skin is starting to brown and fat is rendering, about 12 minutes. Move wings to medium-high zone of grill or increase heat under grill pan to medium-high. Cook wings, moving to a cooler section of grill or reducing heat if they start to burn, until cooked through, an instant-read thermometer inserted into the flesh but not touching the bone registers 74°C, and skin is crisp and lightly charred, 5–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk gochujang and ¼ cup hot water in a large bowl.
Transfer wings to bowl with gochujang and toss to coat. Transfer to a platter. Top with scallions, season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.

3-ingredient-grilled-steak-pineapple-and.name: 3-ingredient Grilled Steak, Pineapple, And Avocado Salad | Epicurious

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into 1/2" rounds, center core removed, divided

instructions: Season steak with 1 tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pepper. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour.
Meanwhile, purée 1 pineapple round, 1/2 tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth. Add 3 Tbsp. oil and blend until smooth; set aside.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat or heat a grill pan over medium-high; oil grate or pan. Grill steaks and remaining pineapple rounds, turning occasionally, until pineapple is lightly charred and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of steak registers 49°C, 8–10 minutes for medium-rare (pineapple may take longer to cook than steak). Transfer steak to a cutting board. Let sit at least 15 minutes, then thinly slice. Transfer pineapple to a platter and tent with foil to keep warm.
Cut avocados in half crosswise around pit, then carefully peel off skin with your hands. Slice each half crosswise into 1/2" rings.
Arrange sliced steak and avocado on platter with pineapple. Drizzle with pineapple dressing; season with salt and pepper.

3-ingredient-holiday-brie-bites.name: 3-ingredient Holiday Brie Bites

ingredients.item: Trader joe’s mini brie bites (or 10 miniature brie cheese rounds)s

instructions: Using 1½-inch cookie cutters or fruit and veggie cutters, carefully press the center of each Brie round to make a shape on top, then use a butter knife to remove the bloomy rind (¼–½ inch deep).
Dollop the jam evenly into the cutouts in the Brie rounds. Using a skewer or the end of a spoon, smooth and refine the jam filling.
Top 10 of the crackers with the Brie rounds. Arrange on a serving dish alongside the remaining 20 crackers.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-ice-cream-french-toast.name: 3-ingredient Ice Cream French Toast
instructions: Preheat oven to 121°C. Pour ice cream into a large baking dish. Add bread, turn to coat, then let sit 3 minutes. Flip bread and continue to soak until saturated but not soggy, about 3 minutes more.

Heat 2 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium. Using tongs, carefully lift 2 bread slices from custard, letting excess drip back into dish. Transfer to skillet in a single layer and cook until golden brown and the center of toast springs back when pressed, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; keep warm in oven until ready to serve. Repeat with 2 Tbsp. butter and remaining bread. Top toasts with remaining 1 Tbsp. butter and serve.

3-ingredient-mussels-with-white-wine-and.name: 3-ingredient Mussels With White Wine And Pesto
instructions: Bring wine to a boil in a large pot. Add mussels, cover, return to a boil, then reduce heat and bring to a simmer. Cook mussels until they open, 3–4 minutes. Stir in pesto; season with salt and pepper.
Using a slotted spoon, divide mussels among bowls. Top evenly with broth and serve immediately.

3-ingredient-oreo-balls.name: 3-ingredient Oreo Balls
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix Oreo cookie crumbs and cream cheese together in a bowl; roll into balls and arrange on the prepared baking sheet. Freeze cookie balls until solid, about 1 hour.
Melt almond bark in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching.

Dip cookie balls in the melted almond bark, removing balls using 2 forks to allow excess bark drip back into double boiler. Arrange coated cookie balls on the baking sheet; refrigerate until coating is firm, about 10 minutes.

3-ingredient-oreo-mousse-teleculinaria.name: 3-ingredient Oreo Mousse

ingredients.item: 170 g  bolachas oreo ou bolachas de chocolate com recheio de baunilha

instructions: Triture as bolachas e reserve-as. Bata as natas em chantili bem firme.
Envolva muito bem o chantili com o leite condensado e depois com as bolachas. Disponha numa taça, leve ao frio até solidificar e sirva com decoração a gosto.

3-ingredient-peanut-butter-cups.name: 3-ingredient Peanut Butter Cups
instructions: Prepare a cupcake tin with 6 liners.
Stir peanut butter and powdered sugar together until smooth.
Spread 1 to 2 tablespoons of chocolate in the bottom of each cupcake liner.
Dollop 1 to 2 teaspoons of the peanut butter mixture on top of the chocolate.
Cover each dollop of peanut butter with more chocolate and smooth out the top.
Refrigerate for 1 hour or until chocolate has hardened.
Remove peanut butter cups from the liners.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-peppermint-rocky-road-candi.name: 3-ingredient Peppermint Rocky Road Candies

ingredients.item: Dark chocolate chips or chopped dark chocolate
Crushed peppermint candies or candy canes

instructions: Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment or wax paper. Heat chocolate in a medium heatproof bowl set over a medium pot of barely simmering water (bottom of bowl should not touch water), stirring occasionally, or in short bursts in the microwave, stirring in between bursts, until chocolate is melted and smooth.

Fold marshmallows and 1/2 cup candies into chocolate until evenly combined. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of chocolate mixture onto prepared baking sheets; sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup candies. Chill until set, about 30 minutes. Serve at room temperature.
Candies can be made 5 days ahead; transfer to an airtight container and chill.

3-ingredient-pina-colada.name: 3-ingredient Pina Colada
instructions: Combine pineapple, coconut milk, rum, and ice in a blender and puree until smooth and creamy.
Serve immediately.

3-ingredient-red-velvet-strawberry-chees.name: 3-ingredient Red Velvet Strawberry Cheesecake Parfaits

ingredients.prep: (use milk instead of water and butter instead of oil when preparing)
(Set the crust mix aside as you won’t be using it. Prepare according to package directions)

instructions: Mix together red velvet cake mix and cook according to package directions. Cool completely to room temperature (1-2 hours) and cut into ½ -inch (1.2 cm) cubes. Set aside.
While the cake is baking, mix together cheesecake pie filling. Pour mix into a bowl and refrigerate for 1 hour or until it sets.
Slice 3 or 4 whole strawberries and set aside. Cut the remaining strawberries into quarters and set aside as well.
To assemble: fill the bottom inch of serving cups with red velvet cubes. Pipe or spoon another inch or so of cheesecake filling. Top with about 1 inch (2.5 cm) of cubed strawberries.
Repeat the layers again and top with 1 or 2 strawberry slices and chocolate hearts. Serve.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-seared-dates-with-vanilla-i.name: 3-ingredient Seared Dates With Vanilla Ice Cream And Mint
instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium. Add dates and cook, turning often, until lightly browned on all sides, 4–6 minutes.
Divide dates among plates. Add a few small scoops of ice cream to each. Drizzle with oil, then top with mint; season with salt.

3-ingredient-strawberry-icebox-cake.name: 3-ingredient Strawberry Icebox Cake
instructions: Spread a thin layer of whipped cream in a square glass baking dish.
Layer graham crackers on top, then cover with a layer of whipped cream.
Sprinkle ⅓ of the strawberries on top, then layer with cream again.
Repeat steps 2 and 3 until no more ingredients remain. (The top layer should be strawberries and should not be covered with cream.)
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
Enjoy!

3-ingredient-swedish-meatballs.name: 3-ingredient Swedish Meatballs
instructions: Combine frozen meatballs, condensed soup, and sour cream in a slow cooker.
Cover slow cooker. Cook on High until heated through, about 2 hours.

3-ingredient-sweet-and-smoky-brussels-sp.name: 3-ingredient Sweet And Smoky Brussels Sprouts
instructions: Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until partially crisped, 5–7 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to paper towels, reserving fat in skillet.

Add 2 Tbsp. oil to fat and heat over medium. Working in batches and adding more oil if needed, add brussels sprouts in a single layer, cut side down, and sear, without stirring, until well-browned, about 3 minutes. Season with salt, toss to coat, then stir in bacon and dates. Stir in 3/4 cup water, increase heat to medium-high, and cook, mashing dates with the back of a wooden spoon, until dates have dissolved and brussels sprouts are well-glazed, about 2 minutes.

3-ingredient-whipped-cream.name: 3-ingredient Whipped Cream
instructions: Place a medium bowl and mixer beaters into the freezer to chill, about 5 minutes.
Pour cream into the chilled bowl and beat with an electric mixer until frothy. Add sugar and vanilla gradually, continuing to beat until soft peaks form.

3-layer-chocolate-delight-teleculinaria.name: 3-layer Chocolate Delight
instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Depois escorra-as e leve-as a derreter no micro-ondas sem deixar ferver. Reserve. Separe as claras das gemas. Leve ao lume um tacho com o leite, a farinha maisena e as gemas, mexendo sempre até engrossar.
Corte os chocolates e divida cada um por três taças diferentes.
Distribua a mistura do creme pelas 3 taças com o chocolate partido e mexa bem para que me dissolvam. Verta também a gelatina derretida pelas taças e envolva.
Em tigelas separadas bata as natas em chantilly bem firme e as claras em castelo.
Divida-as depois pelas taças com os cremes, como vê na foto.

Mexa bem, verta para uma forma uma camada até solificar. Repita o processo nas restantes.  A cobertura: leve ao lume em banho-maria as natas com o chocolate, depois de derretido, retire e mexa bem até ficar um creme. Retire a forma do frio, mergulhe-a em água morna, desenforme e sirva decorado com o creme de chocolate e as pepitas.

3-minute-chocolate-cream-cheese-frosting.name: 3-minute Chocolate Cream Cheese Frosting

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Melt ¾ cup (125 g) chopped dark chocolate in a heat-proof non-metallic bowl in 30 second bursts in a microwave, stirring between each one, until smooth. (Alternatively, melt the chocolate in a medium heat-proof bowl set over, but not touching, a saucepan full of simmering water.) Stir in 3 Tbsp. Dutch-process cocoa powder and mix until smooth. Set aside.

Beat 8 oz. cream cheese, room temperature, and ½ cup (1 stick; 113g) unsalted butter, at room temperature, in a large bowl using an electric mixer, scraping down sides of mixing bowl as needed until completely incorporated and very smooth.

Add 2 cups (226g) powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and beat on low speed until completely incorporated. Add melted chocolate mixture and beat until combined and no streaks remain. Increase speed to medium and beat until slightly lighter in color and starting to become fluffy, about 30 seconds. Use right away, before the chocolate firms up.
Editor’s note: This recipe for chocolate cream cheese frosting is adapted from one that first appeared in the September 1999 issue of ‘Bon Appétit.’ Head this way for a round-up of our best chocolate cake recipes →

30-minute-tomato-sauce.name: 30 Minute Tomato Sauce
instructions: In a pot over medium heat, add the olive oil, onion, garlic, and tomato paste. Cook for 5-7 minutes or until the tomato paste has caramelized.
Add the canned tomatoes, dried oregano, and dried basil. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the desired thickness.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Enjoy!

30-minute-burger.name: 30-minute Burger
instructions: Make the pickled red onions: In a small pot, combine the water, apple cider vinegar, salt, sugar, peppercorns, and coriander seeds, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Turn off the heat and add the sliced onion, making sure they are fully submerged. Let cool to room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
Make the Thousand Island Dressing: In a medium bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, ketchup, pickles, garlic, and vinegar.
In a large bowl, season the ground beef generously with salt and pepper. Use your hands to mix until evenly combined.
Divide the beef into 4 8-ounce portions and form into patties. Place on a cutting board. Use your thumb to press a divot into the center of each burger.
Heat the grapeseed oil in a cast iron or stainless steel skillet over medium-high heat until nearly smoking. Add the burger patties and cook for 3-4 minutes, without disturbing, until browned.
Use a spatula to flip the burgers over and place a slice of cheddar on each one. Cook for another 3-4 minutes, until the burgers are cooked through and cheese has melted.
Place on sesame buns and top with the pickled red onions, Thousand Island Dressing, tomato, and lettuce. Serve with French fries.
Enjoy!

30-minute-pizza-party-boats.name: 30-minute Pizza Party Boats
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the loaves of bread cut-side up on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small bowl, combine the the olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Brush over the bread.
Bake for 10 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and dried out.
Top the bread with the toppings of your choice. You can mix and match any flavor combinations you prefer!
For Meat Lovers pizza, add marinara sauce, mozzarella, mozzarella, pepperoni, sausage, ham, and bacon.
For Alfredo Veggie pizza, add alfredo sauce, spinach, artichokes, mushrooms, Parmesan, and sun-dried tomatoes.
For Barbecue Chicken Pizza, add barbecue sauce, chicken, pepper Jack, bell pepper, and red onion.
For Prosciutto Pesto Pizza, add pesto, prosciutto, roasted red pepper, Parmesan, eggs, and pepper.
Bake the pizza party boats for 15 minutes, or until the ingredients are heated through and the cheese is fully melted.
Slice and serve!
Enjoy!

30-minute-sheet-pan-chicken-fajitas-fami.name: 30-minute Sheet Pan Chicken Fajitas - Family Meals
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, smoked paprika, cumin, onion powder, garlic powder, oregano, and salt. Set aside.

In a large mixing bowl, toss the chicken strips, bell peppers, and onion with olive oil, minced garlic, lime juice, and adobo sauce. For extra heat, add a whole chipotle in adobo.  Sprinkle the spice mix over everything and toss again to coat evenly.

Spread the chicken and veggie mixture onto a sheet pan in an even layer. Roast for 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through, until the chicken’s internal temperature reaches 165˚F (74˚C). For extra char, broil for 3-5 minutes.

While the fajitas are roasting, prepare the pico de gallo. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, onion, jalapeño (if using), cilantro, lime juice, salt, and garlic. Stir well and adjust seasoning to taste.

Once the fajitas are done, serve the chicken and veggies in warm tortillas, topped with cheese, sour cream, guacamole, and a spoonful of fresh pico de gallo. Don’t forget a squeeze of fresh lime for that perfect zing!
Enjoy!

3bc-baked-bean-casserole.name: 3bc ( Baked Bean Casserole)
instructions: Preheat an oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Melt butter in a large skillet over low heat. Add onion and cook until soft and translucent, 10 to 15 minutes. Transfer to a 2-quart casserole dish and set aside. Cook bacon in the same skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon on a paper towel-lined plate. Cut bacon into bite-sized pieces and set aside.

Combine baked beans, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard in the casserole dish. Stir in 2/3 cooked bacon and 1/4 brown sugar until mixture is combined. Top bean mixture with remaining bacon and sprinkle with remaining brown sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until hot and bubbly, about 45 minutes.
